title: Sophisticated Backpacks: TAN Compat
description: Adds a drinking upgrade to Sophisticated Backpacks that restores Tough as Nails hydration
body:
Adds a Drink Upgrade to Sophisticated Backpacks 2 new upgrades dedicated to Tough as Nails thirst mechanic, works similar to feeding upgrade except its for thirst.

This is an unofficial addon. All credit for the original mods goes to Tough as Nails and Sophisticated Backpacks.
